description_long: This armchair features a rounded, barrel-shaped backrest that seamlessly transitions into the armrests, creating an enveloping and comfortable seating area. The upholstery is a solid, light gray fabric with a tufted button pattern on the inner backrest, adding a touch of classic elegance. The seat is wide and gently contoured, providing ample space for sitting. The chair stands on four slightly tapered wooden legs with a natural finish, giving it a sturdy yet refined appearance. The exterior back and sides are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the detailed tufting on the inside. This design is both modern and timeless, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A light gray, tufted barrel-back armchair with smooth sides and tapered wooden legs, offering a modern yet classic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted button pattern on the backrest and the wide, inviting seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, continuous curve of the armrest and backrest, as well as the angled wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, rounded back with no tufting and the full curvature of the chair's form.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seamless upholstery and the sturdy wooden legs.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, integrated with the backrest in a continuous curve
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium-height, tufted with buttons on the inner surface
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with tufted button detailing
